title: Slime Minibiome
description: Adds a new spreadable mini-biome full of slimes.
body:
![A picture of a bunch of slimes in an oozy cavern, with text that says 'slime mini-biome!'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ttdzhXgG/images/e6afe80a4f8e9225700e55caf4316177d9b16cec.png)
This is a small, simple mod which gives slimes a slightly more noticeable role in the game, by adding a brand-new spreadable mini-biome that they inhabit.

## What does it add?
When adventuring through the caves, you may come across an 'Ooze zone', a slimey patch of cave where slimes live. The walls of an ooze _zone_ are covered in ooze _blocks_, a spreadable block which will occasionally spawn a single slime when a player is in range.


## Spreadable?
![An animated gif showing slimes spreading ooze when they are killed.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ttdzhXgG/images/5e538604fa82c436f515abe7caa8811dd859ac0c.gif)

Much like sculk, ooze blocks can spread. when an ooze-spawned slime is killed, a small patch of ooze will spread around it, causing the slimey biome to spread further!


## Loot!
![A player in an ooze zone, looking up at a slime which is up on a stone room.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ttdzhXgG/images/9b283b6890979d63faab6f2ed906814bd97659e5.png)

Some ooze zones spawn with a circular ring of rooms around the centre -- each room having a chance to contain a barrel full of useful stuff.


Here's a little [showcase video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mPqfRpspLY4) that you can watch if you're interested.


no ai was used in the development of this mod! :-)
